findings.title: Operator precedence bug in isCloud() — nullish coalescing never fires
Hardcoded customfield_10014 fallback contradicts AC-US4-03
findings.fix: Removed hardcoded fallback. Now throws descriptive error when discovery fails.

findings.title: Consecutive bullet items produce separate bulletList ADF nodes
findings.fix: Consecutive bullet items now merge into existing bulletList node instead of creating separate nodes.

findings.title: Duplicate detector addComment hardcodes ADF — fails on Server/DC
findings.fix: Imported and used toCommentBody() from content-format-adapter.ts for correct format per API version.

findings.title: JiraSpecSync.init() must be called manually — easy to forget
findings.issue: Constructor defaults to v3 URL; init() must be called separately for Server detection.

findings.title: writeConflictReport accesses private property via 'as any' cast
Epic create payload types description as string but toDescription returns AdfDocument
findings.fix: Changed description type annotation from string to any.
